BC |date_derivation‎=typology |site=Aosta |field_name=Consolata |coordinate_n=45.7437183 |coordinate_e=7.3194265 |find_circumstances=excavation |sortdate_find=1980 |date_find=before 1981 |location=Soprintendenza per i Beni e le Attività Culturali (Aosta) |inventory_number=no inv. no. |morandi=43 a, b |source_detail=Mollo Mezzena 1994: 157 |checklevel=0 }} == Commentary == Images in {{bib|Mollo Mezzena 1982}}: 212, fig. 9 above (drawings = {{bib|Mollo Mezzena 1994}}: 159, fig. 19a). Two fragments of a black-glazed patera (imitation type Lamboglia 36) found in the settlement in the [[Consolata]] area. Dating from Morandi (agreeing with that of imitations of Lamboglia 36).
